overall.description: First-person exploration of a fantasy city's historic district at night, featuring classical stone architecture, monumental statues, and a circular colonnade. The player character walks through the Imperial City Arboretum, observing the environment under moonlight before entering a building.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior courtyard with classical statues and ruins

agents.ego_description: walking along a cobblestone path, circling a large robed statue and approaching a circular colonnade structure

entered.detail: tall stone statue of a robed figure holding a book or tablet, weathered texture
ancient stone wall with vertical fluted columns integrated into the structure
large circular building with multiple stone columns visible in the distance
ornate street lamp with warm yellow glow on a blue metal pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close view of a monumental stone statue in a courtyard at night. The camera moves around the statue, revealing cobblestone paths, scattered trees, and the ruins of classical architecture. Warm lamplight mixes with cool moonlight as the player approaches a large circular colonnade in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of circular colonnade with open roof

events.description: entering the circular colonnade structure through the outer ring of columns
NPCs in red robes become visible standing near the inner colonnade wall

agents.ego_description: walking into the circular colonnade, passing between tall stone columns toward the central statue

notable_agents.action: figure in red robes standing still near the colonnade columns

entered.detail: massive fluted stone columns supporting the colonnade roof, creating a corridor effect
large stone statue standing on a pedestal in the center of the circular space

segments.scene_description: The player enters the circular colonnade, a semi-enclosed space with massive stone columns. The ground transitions to smooth paved tiles. A few NPCs in red robes stand near the walls as the player moves deeper into the structure, approaching a central statue visible through the columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: central open area of colonnade with sky view

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the large moon and starry sky through the open roof of the colonnade
exiting the colonnade through the outer ring of columns back to exterior

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the moon through the open roof, then circling the central statue and exiting the structure

entered.detail: reddish-orange planet or moon visible through the open roof against the dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: Inside the colonnade's center, the player looks up through the open roof to reveal a stunning view of a large reddish moon against a starry night sky. After observing the celestial view, the player moves past the central statue and exits the structure, returning to the exterior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance approach with lit doorway

events.description: text overlay 'Imperial City Arboretum' appears on screen identifying the location
approaching the arched entrance with warm wall sconce lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated entrance of the Imperial City Arboretum, passing other characters near the doorway

notable_agents.action: character in dark clothing walking toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large stone building facade with arched doorway and warm interior lighting
twin wall-mounted lanterns flanking the entrance archway
tall stone arch leading into the dark interior of the building

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Imperial City Arboretum building, a stone structure with a grand arched entrance illuminated by warm wall sconces. Other characters are visible near the doorway. The text overlay confirms the location as the player walks up the cobblestone path and enters the dark interior through the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a moonlit classical courtyard that leads into a monumental colonnade and finally into a grand stone building. It begins by circling a monumental stone statue amidst ruins and cobblestone paths, where warm lamplight blends with cool moonlight as the camera advances toward a distant circular structure. As the player enters the colonnade, the terrain shifts to smooth paved tiles and the view is framed by massive stone columns and figures in red robes. The scene then opens upward through the structure's roof to reveal a large reddish moon against a starry sky before the camera moves past a central statue and returns to the exterior courtyard. Finally, the path leads toward the Imperial City Arboretum, moving past warm wall sconces and other characters to enter the dark interior through a grand arched entrance.
